title: Cleaned Tooltips
description: This mod tidies up your item tooltips for a cleaner, more organized look. It groups enchantments together and gives the advanced debug info a fresh coat of paint.
body:
**Cleaned Tooltips** is a simple, client-side quality-of-life mod that completely tidies up the item information. It takes the default messy lists and reorganizes them into something much cleaner and easier on the eyes.

# What does it do?
- **Groups Enchantments**: All enchantments are now tucked neatly under a single "Enchantments:" header, so you can see them all at a glance.
- **Highlights Curses**: Curses are colored red, while regular enchantments are green, making it super easy to spot the bad from the good.
- **Cleans Up Advanced Info**: For the technical players who use F3+H, the item ID and NBT data are also grouped under a clean "Advanced Information:" header, separating them from the rest of the stats.
